Step.description: A single step in a test definition.

check.description: Post-execution assertions.  Keys are assertion names; values are expected values.  Example: `{ "status": 200, "duration_ms_lt": 500 }`.

name.description: Human-readable label shown in log output.

outputs.description: Variable name to store step output under for `${{ name.field }}` use.

use.description: Action identifier, e.g. `"std/http@v1"`. Written as `use:` in YAML; `uses:` is accepted as an alias (GitHub-Actions muscle memory).

uses.description: Action identifier, e.g. `"std/http@v1"`. Written as `use:` in YAML; `uses:` is accepted as an alias (GitHub-Actions muscle memory).

description: Top-level test definition — a list of steps executed per VU iteration.
title: TestDef
